name: Ego4D
data_access: ego4d CLI after signing the Ego4D license (AWS credentials emailed)
redistribution: not permitted: gated license; raw narrations stay in the local cache and verbatim text is not republished
suitability: download+cluster target, gated: real #C/#O narrations behind the license
focus_en: Foundational 3,670 hour worldwide egocentric corpus with millions of timestamped free-form narrations and a multi-task benchmark suite.
focus_cn: 覆盖全球的 3,670 小时第一人称基础语料库，包含数百万条带时间戳的自由文本旁白，以及多任务基准套件。
datapath_en: Ego4D collects 3,670 hours of daily-life first-person video from more than 900 camera wearers across 74 locations in 9 countries. Annotators write dense, timestamped free-form narrations (about 3.85 million sentences) describing each atomic action, using a tag convention where #C marks the camera wearer and #O, #X, #Y mark other people in the scene. These narrations seed task-specific labels for a multi-task benchmark covering episodic memory, hands and objects, audio-visual diarization, social interaction, and forecasting. The video and narrations sit behind a signed license and are fetched with the ego4d CLI, so the raw narration text cannot be redistributed in this atlas.
datapath_cn: Ego4D 采集了来自 9 个国家、74 个地点、900 多名相机佩戴者的 3,670 小时日常第一人称视频。标注者撰写密集的、带时间戳的自由文本旁白（约 385 万句），描述每个原子动作，并采用标签约定：#C 表示相机佩戴者，#O、#X、#Y 表示场景中的其他人。这些旁白为多任务基准生成任务相关标签，涵盖情景记忆、手与物体、音视频说话人分离、社交互动与预测。视频与旁白受签署许可约束，需通过 ego4d 命令行工具获取，因此原始旁白文本无法在本图谱中再分发。
no_corpus_en: Ego4D is the canonical download+cluster target, but its language sits behind a signed dataset license that restricts redistribution. The narrations can be analyzed locally after approval, yet the verbatim strings cannot be republished here, so Ego4D is documented descriptively with links to the gated source rather than an embedded clusterable corpus.
no_corpus_cn: Ego4D 是典型的下载并聚类目标，但其语言数据受签署的数据集许可约束，限制再分发。获批后可在本地分析旁白，但逐字字符串不能在本图谱中重新发布，因此以描述性方式记录 Ego4D，并链接到受限来源，而非内嵌可聚类语料。
example_caption_en: Ego4D is a worldwide first-person corpus; the project page shows a teaser video and a collage of egocentric frames.
example_caption_cn: Ego4D 是覆盖全球的第一人称语料库；项目主页提供预告视频与第一人称画面拼图。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2110.07058, ego4d-data.org, and github.com/facebookresearch/Ego4d. Dataset gated under the Ego4D License (code MIT).
citation: Grauman et al., Ego4D: Around the World in 3,000 Hours of Egocentric Video, CVPR 2022 (arXiv:2110.07058).
